features.name: Unreal Engine
features.description: TFT is moving to Unreal Engine as a long-term project. Cosmetics such as tacticians, arenas, and booms will move over gradually, and a dedicated PC client is planned for October.

features.name: Wisps
features.description: Wisps appear in the rightmost shop slot every other round during the planning phase. Buy up to one per round for combat, shop, gold/XP, item, and other effects.

features.name: Flexible Synergy Units
features.description: Blossom, Riftbeast, Elderwood, Sprykin, Coven, and other new traits create more flexible pivots and high-roll moments.
